genre_refs: Star Wars, The Mandalorian, Baby Yoda / Grogu
description: Photorealistic AI-generated, digitally composited portrait parody of Star Wars' 'The Mandalorian.' Trump's photographed head is composited onto the body of a Mandalorian bounty hunter in grey and silver beskar-style armor with a cape, bandolier, and holstered weapons, standing in a snowstorm. He grips a tall flagpole flying the American flag in one armored hand, and tucked into a pouch on his chest is 'The Child' (Baby Yoda / Grogu), the green big-eared creature from the show, peering out. A glowing sun backlights his head through the snow; a Mandalorian helmet rests at lower right. A small stylized White House and eagle signature mark sits in the lower-left corner. There is no on-image text. The tweet reads: 'In a galaxy that demands strength - America stands ready. This is the way. May the 4th be with you.'
notable_text: (no on-image text; tweet: 'This is the way. May the 4th be with you.')
